ordered_block.title: BUILD_GRAPH_LOCK-0
stop_conditions: build lock would silently rewrite release authority or replace current substrate

ordered_block.title: PRESET_CONSOLIDATION-0
stop_conditions: preset consolidation infers canon from convenience or flattens platform distinctions

ordered_block.title: VERSIONING_CONSTITUTION-0
stop_conditions: version law cannot align identity and compatibility without silent reinterpretation

ordered_block.title: RELEASE_INDEX_AND_RESOLUTION_POLICY-0
stop_conditions: index or resolution law smuggles in trust or publication authority

ordered_block.title: RELEASE_CONTRACT_PROFILE-0
stop_conditions: release contract meaning conflicts with canon, compatibility law, or ownership cautions

ordered_block.title: ARTIFACT_AND_TARGET_NAMING_POLICY-0
stop_conditions: naming becomes release authority instead of derived policy

ordered_block.title: CHANGELOG_POLICY-0
stop_conditions: changelog meaning drifts into compatibility or release identity reinterpretation

ordered_block.title: RELEASE_PIPELINE_AND_ARCHIVE_MODEL-0
stop_conditions: pipeline or archive law grants publication or trust authority by convenience

ordered_block.title: OPERATOR_TRANSACTION_LOG_MODEL-0
stop_conditions: operator transaction continuity cannot reconcile replay, snapshot, and release-resolution law

ordered_block.title: DISASTER_DOWNGRADE_AND_YANK_POLICY-0
stop_conditions: downgrade or yank law assumes live publication powers not yet formalized
